title: OSMF Relational Model
description: Schema for validating OSMF Relational Model definitions. A Relational Model defines a schema for modeling relationships between Documents, including both stored data and projections.

$schema.description: Reference to the OSMF meta-schema that validates this Model

$id.description: Unique identifier for this Relational Model

name.description: Human-readable name for this Relational Model

description.description: Human-readable description of what relationships this Model defines

required.description: Field names (from data or projections) that are required in documents implementing this model

many.description: JSON Schema for validating the 'many' array in documents.

manyOverride.description: Set to true to use a custom many schema instead of the standard manyItem. Skips all standard validation on items, itemConnectors, itemData, and itemProjections.

itemConnectors.description: JSON Schema for validating connectors in Document many items.

itemData.description: JSON Schema for validating data in Document many items.

itemProjections.description: JSON Schema for validating projections in Document many items.

connectors.description: Named connectors that participate in this relationship.

criteria.description: JSON Schema fragment defining required attributes for documents matching this connector.

description.description: Human-readable description of this connector's role

from.description: JSON Schema for validating Document 'from' values. Must constrain to array of connector name strings.

to.description: JSON Schema for validating Document 'to' values. Must constrain to array of connector name strings.

data.description: Schema for literal data fields stored directly on this relationship.

additionalProperties.description: JSON Schema for a stored data field

projections.description: Projection slots that Documents must fill. Each slot must reference the standard projectionMapping schema unless refOverride is true.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this projection slot represents

refOverride.description: Set to true to use a custom projection schema instead of the standard projectionMapping

projectionMapping.description: Standard projection mapping structure. Documents use this to specify which connector and field to pull data from.

connector.description: Name of the connector to pull data from

field.description: Field name to extract from the connected document

manyItem.description: Base schema for validating items in a Document's many array. Uses $dynamicRef to pull in Model-defined itemConnectors, itemData, itemProjections.
